_comment: Curated venues that should never appear on the site (member-only clubs, non-venues, private event rentals, no-alcohol businesses). Applied idempotently by `pnpm remove:venues` — soft-deletes by google_place_id, so the same file works against any environment's DB. Append entries with a reason + audit date; never remove entries (the soft-deleted row's google_place_id uniqueness is the resurrection guard).

removals.name: Montclair Golf Enterprises
removals.reason: Golf club (montclairgc.com) — not a public happy-hour venue; operator-reported 2026-06-12

removals.name: Continental Club
removals.reason: Private event rental (full venue buyouts only, no walk-in service) — site verified 2026-06-12

removals.name: 811 Oakland Event Venue
removals.reason: Private event rental space, no walk-in bar service — site verified 2026-06-12

removals.name: Elks4777
removals.reason: Members-only fraternal lodge — public can't visit

removals.name: Elks club
removals.reason: Members-only fraternal lodge — public can't visit

removals.name: Press Coffee - The Roastery
removals.reason: Coffee roastery — coffee_shop family is an excluded discovery type (zero confirmed-HH)

removals.name: CEG Hospitality
removals.reason: Restaurant-group corporate office (primaryType=corporate_office), not a venue

removals.name: Phoenix Beach Volleyball @ RTO Sullivans
removals.reason: Volleyball league organization (primaryType=sports_club), not a venue

removals.name: Pinot's Palette
removals.reason: Paint-and-sip class studio — alcohol only inside ticketed classes, no walk-in bar; site verified 2026-06-12

removals.name: Spokane NIGHT MARKET & Street Fair
removals.reason: Recurring street-fair event, not a venue

removals.name: Tacoma Arts Live
removals.reason: Nonprofit performing-arts organization (primaryType=association_or_organization), not a venue

removals.name: Hunter's Kitten Lounge
removals.reason: Nonprofit cat lounge / rescue (Southern Arizona Cat Rescue), no alcohol service; site verified 2026-06-12

removals.name: The Rustik Barbershop
removals.reason: Barbershop (primaryType=barber_shop); the sibling Rustiks Speakeasy Salon and Wine Bar listing stays
